command: env PYTHONPATH=outputs/code python outputs/code/scripts/write_gold_comparator_summary.py --baseline-dir outputs/results/er-stress-cross-platform/baselines --gold data/studies/gold/er_stress_upr_gold_panel.csv --gold-gene-column gene_symbol --degora-score-csv outputs/results/er-stress-cross-platform/degora_gene_scores.csv --degora-score-label quality_weighted_default --title 'ER stress locked gold-panel comparator summary' --output-csv outputs/results/er-stress-cross-platform/er_stress_cross_platform_gold_comparator_summary.csv --output-md outputs/results/er-stress-cross-platform/er_stress_cross_platform_gold_comparator_summary.md
